config.first_message: Hello! Welcome to ShelterPoint's AI support assistant. I'm here to help you check the status of your claim. May I please have your full name and date of birth?

messages: Thank you for choosing ShelterPoint. Have a great day!
Thank you for calling ShelterPoint. Goodbye!

session_timeout.message: I haven't heard from you in a moment. Feel free to call us back anytime. Goodbye!

tools.name: present_content
tools.description:
Renders UI cards on the frontend during the conversation. Supported card types:
- identity_form -> data: {name, dob, ssn_last4, claim_id} — fires during STEPS 1 & 2 as fields are collected; use null for fields not yet collected
- claim_list -> data: {claims: [{claim_id, claim_type}]} — fires after identity is verified
- claim_status -> data: {claim_id, claim_type, status, last_updated, action_required, action_details} — fires after claim status is read
- benefit_info -> data: {claim_id, claim_type, weekly_benefit, coverage, max_duration, payment} — fires after benefit info is read
- escalation -> data: {} — fires when escalating to a specialist
- thank_you -> data: {} — fires at the end of every call before goodbye
All data must be passed as a JSON string. Use null for unpopulated fields.

params.name: type
params.description: Card type: identity_form, claim_list, claim_status, benefit_info, escalation, thank_you

params.name: data
params.description: Card-specific payload as a JSON string matching the card type schema.
